title: parsonsia boisseriana
intro: Parsonsia boisseriana, also known as the Boisserian's Parsonia or Boisserian's Snail Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments. Parsonsia boisseriana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
